news.paragraph: Zscaler is being highlighted as a high-growth tech stock following a recent share price rebound and a strategic partnership with IXT to expand zero-trust opportunities in critical infrastructure. While the stock has recently faced some downward pressure due to broader market trends, the expansion of its infrastructure footprint serves as a notable business development. Traders should consider these growth drivers alongside recent price volatility.
